problem id: 81e39cf5
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  11001010 -> 10011001
  01001111 -> 10011010
  11100100 -> 11000111
  01110110 -> 11101011
  11011110 -> 10110000
  10111100 -> 01110010
  01001011 -> 10010010
  11110101 -> 11100100

query: 00101111
predicted answer: 01011100
